title: Rich Donabe Glazed Venezuelan Seitan Roast
description: A smoky and tender plant-based roast inspired by Venezuelan Asado Negro, featuring a deep pineapple and molasses glaze cooked in a traditional clay donabe.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in the donabe over medium heat until shimmering.
Sear the seitan log on all sides until a dark golden crust forms.
Remove the seitan and set it aside on a plate.
Add the onion, bell pepper, and garlic to the donabe and saute until softened.
Stir in the brown sugar and allow it to melt and bubble slightly.
Pour in the pineapple juice, soy sauce, and liquid smoke while stirring to deglaze the pot.
Return the seitan log to the donabe and spoon the liquid over the top.
Cover the donabe and simmer on low heat for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and increase heat to reduce the sauce into a thick glaze.
Slice the seitan roast into thick rounds and serve drizzled with the remaining glaze.
